message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.linalg.eig + numpy.polyfit wrappers (br-franken_numpy-1w2y, br-franken_numpy-fqha)

Expose fnp_python.linalg_eig delegating to numpy.linalg.eig and
fnp_python.polyfit delegating to numpy.polyfit.

linalg_eig parity covers:
- diagonal matrix eigenvalue sort-parity
- symmetric matrix (real eigenvalues)
- rotation matrix (complex conjugate pair) with dtype parity
- A @ v == lambda * v eigendecomposition invariant

polyfit parity covers:
- linear fit y = 2x + 1
- quadratic fit y = x^2
- full=True (coeffs, residuals, rank, singular, rcond) tuple length + rank parity
- weighted fit
- cov=True returns (coeffs, cov) tuple with cov-matrix shape parity
